known_limitations: The Solidity parser remains regex-oriented rather than a full compiler AST.
Inter-function reasoning is deliberately bounded and a dispatch-helper false negative remains documented.
Historical and post-change holdouts are curated rather than random representative samples.
No real-world accuracy percentage, perfect recall, exploitability, or autonomous-audit capability is established.
No external practitioner testimonial, customer validation, measured time saving, or paid pilot has been obtained.
Eligibility, authorization, KYC, sanctions, payout accessibility, and current rules require separate evidence for every opportunity.

exclusions: No live exploitation, fund movement, or out-of-scope probing
No identity, residency, KYC, sanctions, or payment circumvention
No severity or exploitability claim without human validation
No automatic bounty or contest submission
offer.name: Bounded Solidity Pre-audit Pilot
pilot_shape: Agree written authorization, exact file scope, rules, deadline, and compensation route before work starts
Create a hash-locked scope manifest and stable run identifier
Run the local scanner without exporting full target source
Manually accept or reject every material hypothesis
Deliver a concise root-cause and remediation report with an explicit coverage boundary
offer.summary: A small human-led, tool-assisted review of an exact authorized Solidity scope. BugDNA accelerates intake and hypothesis ranking; the analyst remains responsible for reachability, impact, false-positive rejection, remediation, and any permitted local proof.

audiences: protocol teams considering a bounded pilot
project.name: BugDNA | Crypto Vulnerability Intelligence Engine
project.summary: BugDNA is a local, modular Solidity security research assistant. It locks an exact authorized scope, ranks detector hypotheses, preserves evidence and limitations, and produces deterministic source-free bundles for human review. This public showcase presents the product architecture and measured evidence without publishing the private implementation.
project.tagline: Proof-first Solidity security research, with human validation and explicit claim boundaries.
